prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document focuses on cancer screening procedures, specifically for bowel cancer within the NHS framework, which operates primarily in England. The Scottish healthcare system has its own protocols and guidelines for cancer screening, meaning this document does not apply to Scotland.
